headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -49.7)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 76% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 141 quotes and a striking 106 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting with real force today and pushing the score to 58.8.
• Frustrations sit in the upper third of their 175-day range, signalling this is well above typical activity rather than an outlier spike.
• Fears and Optimism both recovered from yesterday's deeper lows, though both remain in negative territory — quieter than average but less so than the day before.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
